title: Revathy Venugopal
text: I’m Revathy Venugopal, a passionate developer from India with a Master’s degree in Automotive Embedded Systems from ESIGELEC & MAHE. I have experience in image processing using TensorFlow API and YOLO. Currently, I work as a full-time developer at Ansys, specializing in Python (PyAnsys)
